/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/_set_velocity_s.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/_get_velocity_s.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/srv/_emergency_stop_s.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/msg/_cmd_throttle_msg_s.c.o CMakeFiles/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces/msg/_kinematic_debug_msg_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rhobtor/PHD/Cuadriga_j8/src/Cuadriga/src/ARGOSJ8_IA_/build/cuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libcuadriga_ctl_platform_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
